blockingIssues.description: packages/telemetry/src/span.ts still misses the required durationMs attribute on defect and interruption paths because withSpan measures duration around Effect.either(effect), which only converts typed failures before annotateCurrentSpan runs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require workers to mark skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false whenever they claim a TDD-first flow but edit implementation before creating and running failing tests, including on fix reruns.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix-ssh-timeout-scope review found the worker transcript edited packages/ssh/src/*.ts before creating the new timeout-scope test file, while the handoff still reported skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align VAL-INFRA-012 with the implemented telemetry contract so it explicitly states whether durationMs is a required span attribute.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix-telemetry-duration review again found shared guidance inconsistency: validation-contract.md omits durationMs while features.json and .factory/library/architecture.md require it.
